goods_description.certificate_value: Autoparts,See attached inv: 2602763 dated 20260223 Grossweight refers to CMR and cargospec
goods_description.invoice_value: Various parts and components listed with matching invoice reference '2602763' and date '20260219' to '20260223', including bumper cover, wiper arm, screws, sealing ring, transmission oil, and more.
goods_description.motivation: Certificate uses general goods description with explicit invoice reference '2602763' and date. Invoice '2602763' matches exactly and contains detailed parts relating to autoparts, fulfilling rule 4.3.5 permissions to accept general descriptions supported by invoice reference.

quantity.invoice_value: 13 PACKAGE 399.2 Gross weight (KG) total per district 40531 Gothenburg Sweden
quantity.motivation: Certificate gross weight '399,2 Gross KG' identified exactly in invoice total as '399.2 Gross weight' for 13 packages. Corresponding shipment units confirmed in invoice, fulfilling main quantity verification and package quantity exception rule.

origin.certificate_value:
EUROPEAN UNION
CN MX SE DE FR CA HU CZ US SK PL GB JP MA IT MK ES NO NL KR
origin.invoice_value: Origin codes in invoice lines include: CN, MX, SE, DE, FR, CA, HU, CZ, US, SK, PL, GB, JP, MA, IT, MK, ES, NO, NL, KR with EU countries present
origin.motivation: Certificate origin indicating 'European Union' plus multiple countries matched with invoice item origins including EU member states. EU normalization applies, accepting additional EU countries in invoice origin list per rules 4.5.4.1 and 4.5.4.2.

overall_assessment.decision_summary: All critical control points match with explicit and unambiguous verification against the invoice.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter stämmer överens mellan certifikatet och fakturan, och dokumenten kan godkännas automatiskt.
